description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a single sloped shed roof covered in irregularly placed stones. The exterior is constructed from weathered wooden planks, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. At the front, there is a simple wooden door and a small, raised platform with a slanted roof, supported by wooden beams, which shelters a black bucket and a stone. The cabin sits on a circular patch of bare earth with sparse grass, blending into a natural outdoor setting. There are no visible windows, and the structure appears compact and utilitarian. The overall design suggests a primitive, hand-built shelter suitable for rural or park environments.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a sloped stone-topped roof, weathered planks, and a simple front platform with a bucket and stone. The structure is compact and utilitarian, set on a patch of bare earth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden door, small raised platform with a slanted roof, a black bucket, and a stone beneath the platform.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the sloped roof with stones, the side wall, and the platform structure extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back wall and the full extent of the sloped roof, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the side wall, the platform, and the bucket, with the roof's stone details visible.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, covered in irregularly placed stones, moderate overhang
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; the cabin appears windowless from all views shown
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door located on the front facade, slightly offset to the right beneath the roof overhang
